examples: Transudate: extravascular fluid collection that is basically an ultrafiltrate of plasma with little protein and few or no cells. Fluid appears grossly clear.
Methods Casein was hydrolyzed by trysin and chyomtrysin together. The enzymatic hydrolysis was filtrated by ultrafiltrate membrane, and analyzed by SDS-PAGE.
The ultrafilter should be sized to provide 3.0 gallons per minute of ultrafiltrate for each 100 ft. 2 /minute of coatable surface area even when flux rate is at low level.
